form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (23.25) when third at this track in a Grade 5. Has performed well off the draw with a win and four places from seven starts. Has ability and looks a key chance.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (18.03) at Taree Super Track in a Grade 5, finishing sixth and beaten 10 lengths. Has one success and six minors from 13 starts from box 2. Key chance and should go close.
